blockingIssues.description: internal/runtime/cloud_hypervisor_linux.go:223 returns runCtx.Err (method value) where error is required, causing a linux-target compile-time type mismatch.
internal/rpc/deployments/handlers.go changed deployment SSE event contract from deployment/logs to state/log, breaking existing dashboard listeners expecting deployment/logs.
internal/rpc/deployments/handlers.go gates incremental log polling on lastLogTS.Valid, so deployments with no initial logs never stream subsequent logs.

appliedUpdates.description: Added commands.build_linux (GOOS=linux go build ./...) for linux-target validation of platform-specific files.
Updated .factory/library/architecture.md RPC package map entry to reflect domain sub-package split.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require GOOS=linux build validation when a feature edits *_linux.go files or linux-tagged code.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: str-split-cloud-hypervisor introduced a linux-only compile error in internal/runtime/cloud_hypervisor_linux.go:223 that host-only build/vet/test did not catch.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: For API/RPC refactors, add an explicit contract verification step against known consumers (routes, payloads, SSE event names).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: str-split-rpc-package introduced deployment SSE contract drift in internal/rpc/deployments/handlers.go versus dashboard expectations in web/dashboard/src/lib/api.ts.
